hooks.command: sh -c 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != / ]; do f="$d/.codex/hooks/pogo_policy_hook.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then exec env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 "$f" session-start; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0'

sh -c 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != / ]; do f="$d/.codex/hooks/pogo_policy_hook.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then exec env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 "$f" pre-tool-use; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0'

sh -c 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != / ]; do f="$d/.codex/hooks/pogo_policy_hook.py"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then exec env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 "$f" user-prompt-submit; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; exit 0'
